description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On July 31, 2025 at 11:00 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a collision 
involving a passenger car on Melrose Avenue near N. Ardmore Avenue.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling westbound in the left lane on Melrose Avenue when it slowed to a stop in a queue of traffic for a red light at 
the intersection with N. Ardmore Avenue. While the Waymo AV was stopped, a passenger car that was traveling directly behind the 
Waymo AV approached the Waymo AV from behind and the front of the passenger car made contact with the rear of the Waymo AV. At 
the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
